rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Reuse `getAuthService()` singleton from `withAuth.ts` instead of instantiating `JwtService` directly — it manages the singleton lifecycle.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"`Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` in the OPTIONS handler conflicts with the same-origin default used elsewhere in the codebase.","scope":"src/app/api"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Co-located `*.test.ts` next to `route.ts` using `vi.useFakeTimers()` and `NextRequest` is the established test pattern here.","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Routing through `AuthService.login()` (PBKDF2/Payload) vs old `src/api/auth/login.ts` (SHA-256/UserStore) intentionally avoids dual-auth anti-pattern.","scope":"auth"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Old `src/api/auth/login.ts` utility was intentionally left untouched since the task scope only covered adding the new route handler.","scope":"auth"}]}
